description: An operator notices a ground unit has called for an air strike dangerously close to another friendly unit's position.

nodes.task_description: Monitor the fire support request channel and the COP simultaneously.

expected_outcome.value: Operator maintains awareness of both requests and friendly positions.

nodes.task_description: Identify that the requested target coordinates are within the safety distance of a friendly unit displayed on the COP.

expected_outcome.value: Operator correctly identifies the high-risk friendly fire situation.

nodes.task_description: Issue an immediate 'CHECK FIRE' command over the radio and notify both units of the potential conflict.

expected_outcome.value: Operator intervenes in time to prevent the friendly fire incident.
